title.source: Assigning input and ideas to your colleagues
title.target: Assigning input and ideas to your colleagues

description.source: Collaborate with colleagues on inputs inside a project and on proposals
description.target: Collaborate with colleagues on inputs inside a project and on proposals

body:0002.source: Assigning input and ideas to colleagues allows you to distribute work across your team so that every idea, comment, or proposal gets timely follow‑up.
body:0002.target: Assigning input and ideas to colleagues allows you to distribute work across your team so that every idea, comment, or proposal gets timely follow‑up.

body:0004.source: Increases internal efficiency by making clear who is responsible for each item.
body:0004.target: Increases internal efficiency by making clear who is responsible for each item.

body:0005.source: Ensures participants see their input processed quickly, which improves trust and encourages them to return.
body:0005.target: Ensures participants see their input processed quickly, which improves trust and encourages them to return.

body:0007.source: Ideas (via the Input Manager in each project)
body:0007.target: Ideas (via the Input Manager in each project)

body:0008.source: Proposals (via the Proposals overview in the back‑end)
body:0008.target: Proposals (via the Proposals overview in the back‑end)

body:0009.source: How to assign inputs to colleagues?
body:0009.target: How to assign inputs to colleagues?

body:0011.source: By default, every new idea is assigned to:
body:0011.target: By default, every new idea is assigned to:

body:0012.source: The first project manager created for that project.
body:0012.target: The first project manager created for that project.

body:0013.source: If there’s no project manager, the first platform administrator.
body:0013.target: If there’s no project manager, the first platform administrator.

body:0015.source: Go to General Tab of your project page → Access Rights tab.
body:0015.target: Go to General Tab of your project page → Access Rights tab.

body:0016.source: Select a PM or admins in the section Who is responsible for processing the posts?
body:0016.target: Select a PM or admins in the section Who is responsible for processing the posts?

body:0017.source: You can update this at any time.
body:0017.target: You can update this at any time.

body:0019.source: Open the Input Manager for the project.
body:0019.target: Open the Input Manager for the project.

body:0020.source: Reassign any idea to a specific colleague.
body:0020.target: Reassign any idea to a specific colleague.

body:0021.source: The new assignee receives an email notification and a platform notification immediately.
body:0021.target: The new assignee receives an email notification and a platform notification immediately.

body:0022.source: How to follow up on assigned inputs?
body:0022.target: How to follow up on assigned inputs?

body:0024.source: Use the dropdown filter to see only the ideas assigned to you.
body:0024.target: Use the dropdown filter to see only the ideas assigned to you.

body:0025.source: Switch the toggle to show inputs that still need feedback.
body:0025.target: Switch the toggle to show inputs that still need feedback.

body:0026.source: Use the dropdown to view another colleague’s assignments if needed.
body:0026.target: Use the dropdown to view another colleague’s assignments if needed.

body:0028.source: Admins and project managers receive a weekly email listing all their assigned inputs that still require feedback.
body:0028.target: Admins and project managers receive a weekly email listing all their assigned inputs that still require feedback.

body:0029.source: An input remains in this list until feedback has been given.
body:0029.target: An input remains in this list until feedback has been given.

body:0031.source: Project managers/admins can leave internal comments on ideas
body:0031.target: Project managers/admins can leave internal comments on ideas

body:0032.source: Internal comments are visible only to staff, not to participants
body:0032.target: Internal comments are visible only to staff, not to participants

body:0033.source: Find this by: Project → Ideation/Proposal phase → Click an idea → Internal Comments
body:0033.target: Find this by: Project → Ideation/Proposal phase → Click an idea → Internal Comments
